name: Smoked Glass Floor Lamp Black - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your room in sleek style with this Smoked Glass Floor Lamp from Threshold™. This floor lamp features a slim metal column with a round base that's perfectly complemented by a cone-shaped smoked glass shade for a soft, ambient glow. Plus, the lamp easily lights up with the push-button foot switch. Place this floor lamp next to your armchair, sofa or any other piece of furniture to illuminate your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
